headline: Registration is Now Open for Microchip’s Annual MASTERs Conference 2026
summary: Join Microchip from August 10-13, 2026, for its premier in-person technical training event featuring over 90 classes designed by engineers for engineersCHANDLER, Ariz., March 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Microchip Technology (Nasdaq: MCHP) today announces that registration is now open for its MASTERs Conference in North America, a premier technical training event for embedded design engineers. In its 26th year, the MASTERs Conference is taking place at the JW Marriott Desert Ridge Resort & Spa i
